Title: 12345_TC_001_ACCOUNTS_CREATE USER_Validate a user can be created

Step Action:
Precondition:
* Have access to the application under test
* Have permission to create users
Test Data: a unique username
Open the Users page and start creating a new user with the test data

Step Expected: Validate the user is created and appears in the users list

Title: 12345_TC_002_ACCOUNTS_CREATE USER_Validate a duplicate username is rejected

Step Action:
Precondition:
* Have access to the application under test
* A user already exists with a known username
Open the Users page and attempt to create a user with the existing username

Step Expected: Validate an error is shown and no duplicate user is created
